st.terminal_panel.desc: A compact and intricate terminal panel. The command prompt is blinking, waiting for input.
st.terminal_core.desc: A complex and clever core. A bit pricey, but worth it. Pick it up to start your terminal journey.
st.command.help.rm: Remove a file or empty directory
st.command.error.permission: You do not have permission to access this user's folder
st.command.error.unknown: Unknown command. Type 'help' for available commands.
st.command.user.actions: Available actions: switchingmode (mode: creative/1, survival/0, adventure/2, spectator/3)
st.terminal.enter: Entering terminal mode. Type 'exit' to leave.
